parents.subject: LU-17914 lnet: Fix erroneous net set error

commit.subject: LU-17463 llite: add a tunable parameter for mlocked page checking
commit.message:
LU-17463 llite: add a tunable parameter for mlocked page checking

Add a tunable parameter to control whether the mlocked pages
functionality is enabled.
This will allow disabling this feature if something goes wrong in
the feild.

Signed-off-by: Qian Yingjin <qian@ddn.com>
Change-Id: I234dd2ea7f0e73b019fdf6089a2d5e63d1f49d4b
